class.name: image_transport/axon_pub
class.description: axon zero-copy image transport (publisher): pixels move cross-process via a dma-buf pool + SCM_RIGHTS sidecar; only a small descriptor is published.

class.name: image_transport/axon_sub
class.description: axon zero-copy image transport (subscriber): reads each frame straight from the shared dma-buf delivered by the sidecar.
